case_title: IMHOFF, ROBERT A. vs. OSORIO, SONDRA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMHOFF, ROBERT A. AS TO DEFENDANT OSORIO, SONDRA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IMHOFF, ROBERT A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSORIO, SONDRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 600 FELL STREET #407, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT OSORIO, SONDRA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $24.17 FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMHOFF, ROBERT A.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OSORIO, SONDRA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMHOFF, ROBERT A. AS TO DEFENDANT OSORIO, SONDRA DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMHOFF, ROBERT A. SERVED JUL-18-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OSORIO, SONDRA
